programs.title: Bulletproof
programs.desc: Mobster's (James Caan) goons pursue underling (Adam Sandler) and cop (Damon Wayans).

programs.desc: A cop must arm prisoners to help fend off an attack by gunmen who want to kill a gangster.

programs.title: Hard Target 2
programs.desc: A retired mixed martial artist is tricked into becoming the target of a human hunt.

programs.title: Carlito's Way: Rise to Power
